name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.46: product image hosting + normalization. New src/images.js (sharp) squares images to 800x800 by padding (never cropping), outputs WebP with alpha preserved, auto-detects imageHasBackground from the border, and offers opt-in white-background knockout via edge flood-fill that preserves enclosed white. Product edit upload now normalizes and rehosts to R2, a one-time batched migration job rehosts existing Weimi image URLs (keeping weimiImgUrl as fallback), a SQL guard stops Weimi sync clobbering normalized images, and config now carries an images map (goodsId to url plus hasBackground) so the kiosk can source grid tiles from us. Cumulative over v5.45.
